ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "company_founded" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "company_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "company_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Market Cap, Enterprise Value) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the metric was obtained */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "metric_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the metric is updated (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market data belongs to */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data point (e.g., Market Cap, Enterprise Value) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Value of the market data point */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the market data was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the market data was obtained */,
  "market_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the market data (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "market_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the market data is updated (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial statement belongs to */,
  "statement_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "statement_value" REAL /* Value of the financial statement */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the financial statement was obtained */,
  "statement_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the financial statement (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "statement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial statement (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial ratio belongs to */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio (e.g., P/E Ratio, PEG Ratio) */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the financial ratio */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the financial ratio was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the ratio was obtained */,
  "ratio_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the ratio (e.g., times, percentage) */,
  "ratio_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the ratio is updated (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratios_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is updated from the source (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., Market Data, Financial Statements) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the dataset was obtained */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the dataset was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  "file_last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the file was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user (e.g., Senior Analyst, Portfolio Manager) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Research, Finance) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission granted */,
  "permission_expires" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
